channel.title: Uliana Parkina
channel.description: Freshman21 is a Jekyll blog theme.

item.title: Hello world!
item.description:
Hello world! This site is my first English blog.

Here I plan to share thoughts on topics that interest me: research, mathematics, machine learning, papers, experiments, and science in general.

I hope this blog will become a small collection of ideas, projects, and interesting things I learn along the way.
